data.body: Fix pushed to Gerrit as change 647 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/647). Added a balanced 6-entry gold_set (3 finding, 3 pass) to plan-review-g7.eval.yaml. Verified locally: all 18 packaged specs pass strict validate_eval_spec; eval-discipline pytest (65) green; make lint + typecheck green. Handing to auto-lander.
